'''√l-dh-z''' ('''ladhaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elevator|elevator]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elevator|elevator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| ladhaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ladhazithi|ladhazithi]] || [[word:ladhaziji|ladhaziji]] || [[word:ladhazishi|ladhazishi]] || [[word:ladhazi|ladhazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhazuthuth|ladhazuthuth]] || [[word:ladhazujuj|ladhazujuj]] || [[word:ladhazushush|ladhazushush]] || [[word:ladhaz|ladhaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhazuthu|ladhazuthu]] || [[word:ladhazuju|ladhazuju]] || [[word:ladhazushu|ladhazushu]] || [[word:ladhazu|ladhazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhazufuth|ladhazufuth]] || [[word:ladhazufuj|ladhazufuj]] || [[word:ladhazufush|ladhazufush]] || [[word:ladhazuf|ladhazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ladhazethe|ladhazethe]] || [[word:ladhazeje|ladhazeje]] || [[word:ladhazeshe|ladhazeshe]] || [[word:ladhaze|ladhaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhazothoth|ladhazothoth]] || [[word:ladhazojoj|ladhazojoj]] || [[word:ladhazoshosh|ladhazoshosh]] || [[word:ladhaz|ladhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhazotho|ladhazotho]] || [[word:ladhazojo|ladhazojo]] || [[word:ladhazosho|ladhazosho]] || [[word:ladhazo|ladhazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhazofoth|ladhazofoth]] || [[word:ladhazofoj|ladhazofoj]] || [[word:ladhazofosh|ladhazofosh]] || [[word:ladhazof|ladhazof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhazïfïf|ladhazïfïf]] || [[word:ladhazïfïf|ladhazïfïf]] || [[word:ladhazïfïf|ladhazïfïf]] || [[word:ladhazïfïf|ladhazïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]] || [[word:ladhazïf|ladhazïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ladhazæthæ|ladhazæthæ]] || [[word:ladhazæjæ|ladhazæjæ]] || [[word:ladhazæshæ|ladhazæshæ]] || [[word:ladhazæ|ladhazæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhazathath|ladhazathath]] || [[word:ladhazajaj|ladhazajaj]] || [[word:ladhazashash|ladhazashash]] || [[word:ladhaz|ladhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhazatha|ladhazatha]] || [[word:ladhazaja|ladhazaja]] || [[word:ladhazasha|ladhazasha]] || [[word:ladhaza|ladhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhazafath|ladhazafath]] || [[word:ladhazafaj|ladhazafaj]] || [[word:ladhazafash|ladhazafash]] || [[word:ladhazaf|ladhazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ladhazasha|ladhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goladhazasha|goladhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiladhazasha|gokiladhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ladhaznüsha|ladhaznüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goladhaznknüsha|goladhaznknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiladhaznüsha|gokiladhaznüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ladhazshësha|ladhazshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goladhaznkshësha|goladhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiladhazshësha|gokiladhazshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ladhazrosha|ladhazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goladhaznkrosha|goladhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiladhazrosha|gokiladhazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhazmusha|ladhazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhaznkmusha|goladhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhazmusha|gokiladhazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ladhazsherasha|ladhazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goladhaznksherasha|goladhaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiladhazsherasha|gokiladhazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ladhazngasha|ladhazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goladhaznkngasha|goladhaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiladhazngasha|gokiladhazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ladhazyasha|ladhazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goladhaznkyasha|goladhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiladhazyasha|gokiladhazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ladhazyamasha|ladhazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goladhaznkyamasha|goladhaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiladhazyamasha|gokiladhazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ladhaznüshësha|ladhaznüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goladhaznknüshësha|goladhaznknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiladhaznüshësha|gokiladhaznüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ladhaznürosha|ladhaznürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goladhaznknürosha|goladhaznknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiladhaznürosha|gokiladhaznürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhaznümusha|ladhaznümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhaznknümusha|goladhaznknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhaznümusha|gokiladhaznümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ladhazshënüsha|ladhazshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goladhaznkshënüsha|goladhaznkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiladhazshënüsha|gokiladhazshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ladhazshërosha|ladhazshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goladhaznkshërosha|goladhaznkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiladhazshërosha|gokiladhazshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhazshëmusha|ladhazshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhaznkshëmusha|goladhaznkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhazshëmusha|gokiladhazshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ladhazronüsha|ladhazronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goladhaznkronüsha|goladhaznkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiladhazronüsha|gokiladhazronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ladhazroshësha|ladhazroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goladhaznkroshësha|goladhaznkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiladhazroshësha|gokiladhazroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhazromusha|ladhazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhaznkromusha|goladhaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhazromusha|gokiladhazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ladhazmunüsha|ladhazmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goladhaznkmunüsha|goladhaznkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiladhazmunüsha|gokiladhazmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ladhazmushësha|ladhazmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goladhaznkmushësha|goladhaznkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiladhazmushësha|gokiladhazmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ladhazmurosha|ladhazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goladhaznkmurosha|goladhaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiladhazmurosha|gokiladhazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ladhaz|ladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lædhæz|lædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holadhaz|holadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holædhæz|holædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholadhaz|hoholadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholædhæz|hoholædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüladhaz|nüladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nülædhæz|nülædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüladhaz|nünüladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünülædhæz|nünülædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïladhaz|nïladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïlædhæz|nïlædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïladhaz|nïnïladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïlædhæz|nïnïlædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luladhaz|luladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulædhæz|lulædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululadhaz|lululadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululædhæz|lululædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liladhaz|liladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilædhæz|lilædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililadhaz|lililadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililædhæz|lililædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koladhaz|koladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolædhæz|kolædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoladhaz|kokoladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolædhæz|kokolædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keladhaz|keladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelædhæz|kelædhæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeladhaz|kekeladhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelædhæz|kekelædhæz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
